comment: BASELINE. IQM HNS=-0.0002 (15g, 38 seeds).

motivation: Establish PQN performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: PQN BASELINE. IQM HNS=-0.0145 (15 games). Significantly worse than PPO by IQM. DoubleDunk HNS=-2.45 dominates mean but IQM trims it.

motivation: Add LayerNorm to PPO NatureCNN — known plasticity intervention from CHAIN-SP paper
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0014 (15g). Below PPO baseline. Neutral. Closed.

motivation: Add Normalize-and-Project to PQN — complement existing LayerNorm, top plasticity method from Plasticine
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0092 (15g). Better than PQN baseline (-0.0145) but well below PPO. Not competitive. Closed.

motivation: Full CHAIN-SP approach: LayerNorm + churn reduction loss for PPO
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0004 (15g, 3-seed). BELOW PPO baseline. W/L net+1 was misleading — IQM reveals no real improvement. Closed.

motivation: DreamerV3-style symlog/symexp on value targets for scale-invariant learning
comment: IQM HNS=0.0000 (15g). Neutral. Closed.

motivation: Post-update weight shrinkage + noise for plasticity maintenance (proven in on-policy RL)
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0003 (15g, 3-seed). BELOW PPO baseline. W/L net+2 was misleading (DoubleDunk/Solaris outliers). Closed.

motivation: Add LSTM to PQN for memory-dependent games (Montezuma, Venture, etc.)
comment: IQM HNS=0.0036 (15g). Massive improvement over PQN baseline (-0.0145→+0.0036). Best PQN variant. 18x above PPO baseline.

motivation: Random Network Distillation intrinsic motivation for hard exploration games
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0030 (15g). Below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Replace NatureCNN with IMPALA ResNet encoder — stronger visual processing with residual connections
comment: CLOSED. IMPALA CNN ~2x slower — timeout issues. Not viable within compute constraints.

motivation: Replace NatureCNN with IMPALA ResNet encoder for PQN baseline
comment: CLOSED. IMPALA CNN too slow. Only 5 games, IQM=0.0023 but not viable due to walltime.

motivation: DrQ-style random shift augmentation — improves representation quality
comment: IQM HNS=0.0006 (15g, 3-seed). Barely above PPO baseline (+0.0004). W/L net+3 was HUGELY misleading — IQM reveals marginal improvement. DrQ is a component of h029 (top technique) but alone is weak. Closed.

motivation: Spectral norm on CNN layers constrains Lipschitz constant, prevents rank collapse
comment: IQM HNS=0.0002 (15g, 3-seed). Same as baseline. Closed.

motivation: Anneal entropy coef from 0.03 to 0.001 — high early exploration, low late exploitation
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0026 (15g). Below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Adaptive value function normalization for scale-invariant learning across games
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0001 (15g). At baseline. Closed.

motivation: Random pruning 50% weights at init, static mask throughout training — ICML 2025 oral
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0017 (15g). Below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Replace PPO clipping with soft TV divergence penalty — ICLR 2025, simpler trust region
comment: IQM HNS=0.0011 (15g). Modest positive (+5.5x baseline). Not reopening — modest gain doesn't justify 3-seed investment. Closed.

motivation: Schedule-Free optimizer eliminates LR annealing, maintains optimal implicit schedule — NeurIPS 2024
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0087 (15g). Well below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Muon uses Newton-Schulz orthogonalization on gradients for matrix-shaped params
comment: IQM HNS=0.0014 (15g). Modest positive (+7x baseline). Not reopening — modest gain. Closed.
IQM HNS=0.0038 (15g, 3-seed). Solid leader among completed hypotheses. Strong on SpaceInvaders/Breakout/MsPacman but weak on DoubleDunk/NameThisGame/Phoenix.

motivation: Combine h013 (SpectralNorm) and h012 (DrQ aug)
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0031 (11g). Below baseline. Combination adds nothing. Closed.

motivation: Replace scalar V(s) with N-quantile distributional value head
comment: IQM HNS=0.0005 (15g, complete pilot). DoubleDunk added: q4=-18.62 (slight negative). Above baseline but modest. Not strong enough for 3-seed.

motivation: Combine SpectralNorm (h013) with S&P (h007) — dual plasticity mechanism
comment: IQM HNS=0.0012 (11g). Modest positive but combination of two individually-below-baseline techniques. Closed.

motivation: NeurIPS 2024 — constrain feature drift via L2 loss on pre-activation changes
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0008 (12g). Below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Two V-heads, min(V1,V2) for conservative advantage. TD3 double-Q trick for PPO.
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0012 (12g). Below baseline. Closed.

motivation: Combine LSTM (h008) + NaP (h004). NaP excludes LSTM params to preserve gates.
comment: CATASTROPHIC. 3/15 pilot. Combination destroys learning. Closed.
IQM HNS=-0.0005 (6g). Below baseline. Breakout curve-derived q4=0.56 added. Closed — DrQ+S&P combination fails.

description: PPO + DrQ Augmentation + Quantile Regression Value
motivation: Combine DrQ + QR-Value without CVaR
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0034 (9g). BELOW baseline. Negative synergy — confirms CVaR is the key ingredient in h029. Closed.

motivation: Novel CVaR-based advantage estimation with quantile regression for risk-sensitive value
comment: COMPLETE 45/45 (15g×3s). Seed-1 IQM=0.0000, all-seed IQM=-0.0002. CVaR wins on BattleZone/Solaris/Phoenix/Alien but loses on DoubleDunk/NameThisGame/Qbert. Net effect: zero improvement over PPO baseline. Best novel idea but not consistently better.

motivation: Product-of-softmax representations for structured sparse features
comment: IQM HNS=-0.0006 (14g complete). BELOW baseline. Alien added: q4=199 (LOSS). SEM alone does not help. 3W/6L/5T. Closed.
IQM HNS=0.0004 (9g, 10 seeds). Near baseline. Zero losses but gains too modest for further investment. Closed.
IQM HNS=-0.0011 (11g). BELOW baseline. Phoenix catastrophic (-0.106 HNS). Closed.

motivation: Add explicit MSE consistency loss between clean (detached) and augmented encoder features
comment: IQM HNS=0.0010 (15/15g pilot COMPLETE). DoubleDunk q4=-18.0 (TIE). Too inconsistent: Solaris+16%, BattleZone+39%, PrivateEye+473% vs MsPacman-78%, NameThisGame-47%. Closed.

motivation: Combine CVaR advantage with Dueling V/A decomposition
comment: CRITICAL BUG: new-code CSVs IDENTICAL to h029 on 3/3 games tested (Phoenix/Qbert/SpaceInvaders). Dueling architecture not producing different training dynamics despite correct code on cluster. Cancelled 12 remaining jobs. IQM was based on curve-derived data, now invalidated.

motivation: Combine CVaR advantage with simplicial embeddings for structured representations
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. IQM HNS=-0.0004 (BELOW baseline). Solaris was HUGE WIN (q4=3485, +61%) but 5 losses cancel it out. 5W/5L/5T. SEM does not enhance CVaR. Closed.

description: PPO + CVaR + Dueling + SEM + DrQ (triple combo)
motivation: Combine CVaR advantage, Dueling V/A decomposition, and SEM representations
comment: COMPLETE 15/15. Seed-1 IQM=-0.0033 (BELOW baseline). Qbert CORRECTED: curve 279→144 (LOSS). 7 LOSSES (BattleZone/Breakout/DoubleDunk/MsPacman/NameThisGame/Phoenix/Qbert), 2 WINS (Solaris/SpaceInvaders), 6 TIE. Triple combo is strictly worse than h029 alone. Closed.

motivation: Add LSTM temporal memory to PPO — PQN+LSTM (h008) was best technique; PPO is stronger base
comment: CLOSED 15/15. IQM=-0.0015. 1W/8L/6T. Only wins: Qbert+7.8%, Solaris+8.5%. Big losses: NameThisGame-20%, PrivateEye-663%, MsPacman-9.3%, Phoenix-7.5%. LSTM hurts PPO.

motivation: Off-policy DQN baseline with envpool — opens entirely unexplored off-policy paradigm
comment: PILOT 8/15 games (7 timed-out, resubmitted with 8h). IQM HNS=0.0066 (8g). Phoenix MASSIVE LOSS (q4=93 vs PPO 892). Record: 5W/1L/2T. Still best hypothesis by IQM. 7 games resubmitted with 8h walltime.

motivation: Add α*τ*log π(a|s) to rewards during GAE — Munchausen RL trick applied to PPO (novel, originally for DQN)
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (15 games × 1 seed). Munchausen reduces policy churn in DQN (BTR paper). Novel for PPO.

motivation: Linearly anneal discount factor γ from 0.95 to 0.999 — shorter horizons early, longer late
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (15 games × 1 seed). Motivated by discount-as-regularizer (Amit et al 2020).

motivation: Munchausen DQN with soft value target + log-policy bonus — key BTR component (NeurIPS 2020, ICML 2025)
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (15 games × 1 seed). BTR ablation shows Munchausen reduces policy churn 11%→3.8%.

motivation: CReLU preserves negative activations, preventing plasticity loss (Abbas et al 2023). Halved conv channels + CReLU = same param count, better gradient flow.
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (15 games × 1 seed). Novel plasticity mechanism for on-policy RL.

motivation: Subtract running mean reward during GAE (Sutton et al 2024). Makes value function learn deviations from average, more numerically stable.
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (15 games × 1 seed). Simple but principled modification to advantage estimation.

motivation: Distributional RL — key Rainbow component. C51 learns full return distribution. 10M steps.
comment: PILOT RUNNING (1/15). Breakout q4=1.40 (10M steps). Note: running at 10M steps vs 40M baseline. 14 games still running.

motivation: Maximum entropy RL for discrete actions. Fundamentally different from DQN/PPO — soft policy with entropy regularization. Opens actor-critic off-policy direction.
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (0/15). 15 jobs across 4 clusters, 10M steps. First max-entropy off-policy attempt.

motivation: Double DQN reduces overestimation: online net selects action, target net evaluates value (Van Hasselt 2016). Key Rainbow component.
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (15 games × 1 seed). 40M steps. If h047 DQN baseline works this should improve it.

motivation: Double conv channels (32→64, 64→128, 64→128) and hidden (512→1024). More parameters = more representational capacity.
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (15 games × 1 seed). 40M steps. Tests if PPO is capacity-limited.

motivation: 3-step returns for better credit assignment — key Rainbow component (Hessel 2018). Uses deque-based n-step buffer per environment.
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (0/15). 15 games × 1 seed, 40M steps. If h047 DQN baseline strong this should improve it.

motivation: Separate V(s) and A(s,a) streams for better state-value estimation (Wang 2016). Key Rainbow component.
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (0/15). 15 games × 1 seed, 40M steps. Same encoder as h047, only architecture change.

motivation: Key Rainbow component. PER samples high-TD-error transitions more often, improving sample efficiency. Beta annealed from 0.4 to 1.0.
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (15 games × 1 seed). 40M steps, 8h walltime. PER adds prioritized sampling to base DQN.

motivation: Distributional RL via quantile regression (Dabney 2018). Learns 200 quantile values. More flexible than C51 — no fixed support range needed. Double DQN-style action selection.
comment: PILOT SUBMITTED (15 games × 1 seed). 40M steps, 8h walltime. Uses Double DQN action selection with quantile Huber loss.
